description.value: The Explorer has developed a sixth sense about hails of gunfire, allowing him to sense gaps and pauses in the lethal rain. He is immune to Pinning by Pistols and Basic Weapons, and adds +1 AP to the value of any cover protecting him from ranged attacks.

system.benefit: The Explorer is immune to Pinning by Pistols and Basic Weapons and adds +1 AP to cover protecting him from ranged attacks.

specialAbilities.name: Pinning Immunity
specialAbilities.description: You are immune to Pinning from Pistol and Basic weapons.

specialAbilities.name: Enhanced Cover
specialAbilities.description: Add +1 AP to any cover protecting you from ranged attacks.
